phrases.intent_en: Where are the car rental desks?
phrases.text_local: Πού βρίσκονται τα γραφεία ενοικίασης αυτοκινήτων;
phrases.cultural_note: Car rental desks are typically in the arrivals hall area.

likely_response.local: Στην αίθουσα αφίξεων, δίπλα στην έξοδο.
likely_response.translation_en: In the arrivals hall, next to the exit.

responses.english: In the arrivals hall, next to the exit.
responses.french: Στην αίθουσα αφίξεων, δίπλα στην έξοδο.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Nikos Kazantzakis statue?
phrases.text_local: Πού βρίσκεται το άγαλμα του Νίκου Καζαντζάκη;
phrases.cultural_note: The statue is located in a stable target area within the airport premises.

likely_response.translation_en: It is in the departures hall.

responses.english: It is in the departures hall.

phrases.text_local: Η αίθουσα Καζαντζάκης είναι για όλους;
phrases.cultural_note: Premium lounge access is typically restricted to certain ticket classes.

likely_response.local: Όχι, μόνο για επιβάτες με πρόσβαση.
likely_response.translation_en: No, only for passengers with access.

responses.english: No, only for passengers with access.
responses.french: Όχι, μόνο για επιβάτες με πρόσβαση.

phrases.intent_en: Is duty-free available for EU flights?
phrases.text_local: Υπάρχει duty-free για πτήσεις εντός ΕΕ;
phrases.cultural_note: Duty-free shopping is typically available for all international departures, including EU.

phrases.intent_en: Do I buy the bus ticket before boarding?
phrases.text_local: Πρέπει να αγοράσω εισιτήριο για το λεωφορείο πριν επιβιβαστώ;
phrases.cultural_note: Bus tickets are usually purchased before boarding at designated points.
